description_long: This is a brown bear-themed doll with a segmented, jointed body reminiscent of an animatronic character. The doll features a rounded head with prominent ears, a black top hat, and a black bow tie at the neck. Its face is detailed with large, circular eyes, a pronounced snout with a black nose, and dotted freckles on the cheeks. The limbs are composed of rounded segments connected at the joints, giving it a mechanical, articulated appearance. The feet are wide and paw-like, and the hands are shaped with simple, rounded fingers. The surface appears matte and slightly textured, suggesting a plastic or vinyl exterior.
description: A brown, bear-themed doll with a segmented, animatronic-like body, black top hat, and bow tie. Features include a rounded snout, large eyes, and articulated limbs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, black top hat, bow tie, and full frontal details of the segmented limbs and rounded feet.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the snout, the curvature of the limbs, and the thickness of the torso and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth back, rounded segments of the limbs, and the back of the head and hat.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the snout, limb joints, and the side of the hat.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is adorned with a black bow tie and a black top hat, evoking a formal, vintage animatronic style reminiscent of classic stage performers. No other garments or patterns are present.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with arms slightly bent and angled outward, legs straight and parallel, and the head facing forward. The posture is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with wide, open eyes, a straight mouth, and slightly raised eyebrows, giving a blank, mechanical look.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and covered by a black top hat.
